Author: bdg
Name: Auto Lister
Punchline: One-click bulk market listing and Dagobert-style repricing with automatic vendor culling.
Description: Adds an 'Auto List' button next to Dagobert's 'Auto Pinch' on the retainer sell list. Clicking it goes through every marketable item shown in the bottom-right quarter of the inventory (the last display page, as sorted on screen), puts each up for sale, opens the price comparison, undercuts the cheapest matching HQ/NQ listing by 1 gil and confirms - until the quarter has no more sellable items or the retainer's 20 sell slots are full. Items whose listing would total under 2,000 gil (price x quantity), or whose vendor price beats the market proceeds after the 5% sales tax, are sold through the retainer instead of taking up a market slot. The price-checking logic mirrors Dagobert's auto pinch. A 'Pinch & Cull' button reprices the retainer's existing listings the same way, but listings whose new price falls under those thresholds are returned to your bags and vendored instead - and a 'Pinch & Cull All' button on the summoning bell's retainer list runs that across every retainer with listings.
